Bovada Hand #1111111111: Hold'em No Limit ($0.02/$0.05 USD) - 2026/06/26 06:46:43 ET
Table 'No.37279418' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Hero ($5.00 in chips)
Seat 2: Villain1 ($4.95 in chips)
Seat 3: Villain2 ($5.20 in chips)
Hero: posts small blind $0.02
Villain1: posts big blind $0.05
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Ah Kh]
Villain2: folds
Hero: raises $0.13 to $0.15
Villain1: calls $0.10
*** FLOP *** [As 7d 2c]
Hero: bets $0.20
Villain1: calls $0.20
*** TURN *** [As 7d 2c] [Qh]
Hero: checks
Villain1: checks
*** RIVER *** [As 7d 2c Qh] [3s]
Hero: checks
Villain1: bets $0.45
Hero: calls $0.45
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Villain1: shows [hidden]
Hero: shows [Ah Kh]
Hero collected $1.55 from pot
